title: Wardlaw, Richard - Chief of Defence Logistics and Support at UK Strategic Command, Ministry of Defence - ACOBA advice
body: "Lieutenant General Wardlaw left his role at the Ministry of Defence in September 2023.  Impact Group Facilitator, Saïd Business School, University of Oxford  Lieutenant General Wardlaw  sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Saïd Business School, University of Oxford. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in July 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Interim Director Logistics Hinkley Point C at EDF Energy UK, Wilson James Ltd  Lieutenant General  Wardlaw sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Wilson James Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in July 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
